name: research-lookup
tagline: Compiles a verified, citation-ready academic reference packet for a manuscript by routing queries through Parallel Search/Extract/Research,
verdict: Clean skill. It scopes itself tightly to manuscript literature research, discloses exactly which queries go to which external API (Parallel by default, OpenRouter only when Perplexity is chosen), never logs or prints API keys, and explicitly tells the agent to treat fetched web content as untrusted data rather than instructions. highlights.summary: Setup pulls a third-party CLI from PyPI: `uv tool install "parallel-web-tools[cli]==0.7.1"` (line 287). Version is pinned and installed in an isolated tool env, which mitigates but does not eliminate
